Faculty/College: APS NOTE
Programme: CUT uses the standard NSC 7-point achievement level scale: L7=80-100%; L6=70-79%; L5=60-69%; L4=50-59%; L3=40-49%; L2=30-39%; L1=0-29%. Life Orientation is capped at 1 point in APS. Minimum APS to study at CUT is 27 for most programmes. Applicants scoring 24-26 may be eligible for a selection test but admission is not guaranteed if the programme is full. Qualification durations: NQF5 = 1yr; NQF6 = 2yrs; NQF7 = 3yrs; NQF8 = 4yrs. Campuses: Bloemfontein (main) and Welkom. Applications close 30 September. LO is capped at 1 point and excluded from most science calculations.
